data.title: Microservice Architecture
data.description: Instagram uses a microservice architecture allowing independent deployment and scalability.
data.technical_spec: Services communicate over HTTP/JSON APIs; managed via Kubernetes.

data.title: GraphQL API
data.description: Uses GraphQL for efficient data fetching, reducing bandwidth usage.
data.technical_spec: GraphQL server implemented in Python with Apollo client for requests.

data.title: Database Layer
data.description: Leverages sharded databases to store and manage large volumes of data.
data.technical_spec: Primarily uses PostgreSQL and Cassandra for different types of data workloads.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Uses CDNs for faster global content delivery and enhanced media streaming.
data.technical_spec: CDNs like Akamai and Cloudflare ensure low-latency access.

data.title: Caching Strategy
data.description: Employs caching mechanisms to speed up data retrieval and improve performance.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Redis and Memcached for in-memory caching solutions.
